creator: zi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Portscout usually doesn't do well with weird/non-standard versions, like 2.0rc1.post2.

If you're interested in trying to figure out the specific issue, please feel free to check out the source here:

https://github.com/freebsd/portscout

Otherwise, I don't intend to try to figure out why it didn't handle "2.0rc1.post2."
